LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER ROWENA SETO'S MOTION FOR ORDER RELIEVING PETITIONER FROM PROVISIONS OF GOV. CODE SECTION 0945.5 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ESTABLISHES EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT AND ORDER BY E-MAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR #5976

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Gov. Code Dection 0945.5
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter J. Koenig, Esq., from Walker, Hamilton & Koenig, 415-986-3339, for petitioner and moving party
Alexandra Atencio, Esq., from Hanson Bridgett LLP, 415-777-3200, for respondent and opposing party

Argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER ROWENA SETO's Motion For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Gov. Code Section 0945.5 is Granted. Plaintiff's declaration establishes excusable neglect. Prevailing party to submit and order by e-mail to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
